content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Create a detailed and structured plan for the novel "iwanna"</objective>
<steps>
1. Define the core premise, genre, and themes of the novel "iwanna".
2. Develop the world-building settings (geography, history, magic/tech systems).
3. Create a comprehensive character roster with detailed profiles.
4. Outline the plot structure (beginning, middle, end) and key story arcs.
5. Establish a chapter-by-chapter breakdown for the initial writing phase.
</steps>
<reason>The owner requested a long novel named "iwanna" with detailed and structured settings. A structured plan is required before execution.</reason>
<checks>dispatch accepts semantic plan</checks>
<paths>stories/novel-named</paths>
</action>
